features: Beautifully wrapped and ready to pop under the tree, indulge in all your bath time essentials for the perfect pamper night
Contains a 300ml bath bubbles and 300ml shower crème to gently cleanse and fragrance the skin
The 50ml hand cream is perfect to nourish your skin, whilst the scented candle help set a peaceful bathroom ambience
description: Product Description Beautifully wrapped and ready to pop under the tree, treat her to a luxury candlelit pamper with our 300ml bath bubbles, 300ml shower crème, 50ml hand cream and a 60g scented candle. All beautifully fragranced with our new Midnight Cherry scent. Indulge in a decadent symphony of senses. This opulent fragrance opens with a tantalizing burst of tart, sour cherry, followed by a sophisticated liquor and a rich, creamy almond accord, leaving a lingering trail of luxurious elegance. Beautifully presented with sumptuous red tones accented with soft pink and bursts of firework luxe gold detailing, this collection is the perfect gift for a pop of party glamour this festive season. A seductive and enchanting blend, Midnight Cherry captures the essence of mystery and allure with its rich and decadent notes. Ingredients BATH BUBBLES: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4, Coumarin, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Vanillin.SHOWER CREME: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycol Distearate, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4, Coumarin, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Vanillin.BODY BUTTER: Aqua (Water, Eau), Paraffinum Liquidum (Mineral Oil), Glyceryl Stearate, Stearic Acid, Glycerin, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Phenoxyethanol, Caprylyl Glycol, Parfum (Fragrance), Carbomer, Sodium Hydroxide, Benzophenone-4, Benzaldehyde Benzyl Benzoate, Coumarin, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Trimethylcyclopentenyl Methylisopentenol, Vanillin. Directions Bath Bubbles - Pour Into Bath Under Warm Running Water. Shower Creme - Lather And Rinse. Body Butter - Massage Gently Into Skin Until Fully Absorbed. Safety Warning WARNING: AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS IN THE EYES RINSE IMMEDIATELY WITH CLEAN WARM WATER. IF SKIN IRRITATION OCCURS DISCONTINUE USE. IF IRRITATION PERSISTS CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR. See more
